name: @factory/portal
description: MERN SaaS Factory Framework - Portal Orchestrator

scripts.cleanup: yarn workspace @factory/backend clean && yarn workspace @factory/frontend clean && rm -rf node_modules yarn.lock
scripts.reset-hard: echo '🧹 INICIANDO RESET HARD COMPLETO...' && echo '⚠️  Esto eliminará TODAS las dependencias y caches' && echo '📦 Limpiando node_modules...' && rm -rf node_modules backend/node_modules frontend/node_modules shared/node_modules && echo '🗑️  Eliminando lock files...' && rm -f yarn.lock backend/yarn.lock frontend/yarn.lock shared/yarn.lock && echo '🧽 Limpiando caches...' && yarn cache clean --all && npm cache clean --force 2>/dev/null || true && echo '🏗️  Eliminando builds...' && rm -rf frontend/build backend/dist && echo '📝 Eliminando archivos temporales...' && rm -rf .yarn/cache .yarn/unplugged .yarn/build-state.yml .yarn/install-state.gz && echo '🗂️  Limpiando archivos de sistema...' && find . -name '.DS_Store' -delete 2>/dev/null || true && find . -name 'Thumbs.db' -delete 2>/dev/null || true && echo '✅ LIMPIEZA COMPLETADA' && echo '📥 REINSTALANDO DEPENDENCIAS...' && yarn install && echo '🎉 RESET HARD COMPLETADO EXITOSAMENTE!'
scripts.build:all: echo '🔧 Building all workspaces...' && echo '📦 Build Shared...' && yarn workspace @factory/shared build && echo '✅ Shared build exitoso' && echo '📦 Build Backend...' && yarn workspace @factory/backend build && echo '✅ Backend build exitoso' && echo '🎨 Build Frontend...' && yarn workspace @factory/frontend build && echo '✅ Frontend build exitoso' && echo '🎉 Todos los builds completados exitosamente!'
scripts.fdeploy: echo '🚀 INICIANDO DEPLOY A PRODUCCIÓN...' && echo '🔧 Verificando builds...' && echo '📦 Build Shared...' && yarn workspace @factory/shared build && echo '✅ Shared build exitoso' && echo '📦 Build Backend...' && yarn workspace @factory/backend build && echo '✅ Backend build exitoso' && echo '🎨 Build Frontend...' && yarn workspace @factory/frontend build && echo '✅ Frontend build exitoso' && echo '🚀 Todos los builds exitosos, iniciando deploy...' && echo '🚀 Haciendo deploy desde raíz del monorepo...' && cd ../../ && flyctl deploy --config packages/portal/fly.toml --dockerfile Dockerfile
scripts.qa:backend: yarn workspace @factory/backend test && yarn workspace @factory/backend build
scripts.qa:check: yarn qa:backend && yarn workspace @factory/shared build && yarn workspace @factory/frontend build
